title: BWHelper
description: A Minecraft Forge 1.8.9 mod that automatically displays Bedwars stats when your username is mentioned in Hypixel Bedwars lobbies. It also lets you see other people's stats manually, just by using a simple command.
body:
# Installation
- Download the latest release
- Place the .jar file in your Minecraft `mods` folder
- Launch Minecraft 1.8.9 with Forge installed
- Join Hypixel and set your API key (see Usage below)
  
# Usage
###  Setting up your API key
- Visit [Hypixel Developer dashboard](https://developer.hypixel.net/).
- Login to your Hypixel forum account to generate a new API key
  - Signup for a forum account if you do not already have one.
- Copy the API key
- Use the command: ```/bwh setkey <your-api-key>```

### Commands
- `/bwh` - Show all available commands
- `/bwh setkey <key>` - Set your Hypixel API key
- `/bwh stats <player>` - Manually view a player's Bedwars stats
- `/bwh toggle` - Toggle automatic stats display on/off

# Stats Displayed
- Bedwars Level: Overall progression in Bedwars
- Final Kills & Deaths: With calculated FKDR (Final Kill/Death Ratio)
- Beds Broken & Lost: With calculated BBLR (Bed Break/Loss Ratio)
- Wins & Losses: With calculated WLR (Win/Loss Ratio)
- Kills & Deaths: With calculated KDR (Kill/Death Ratio)

# How it works
When you're in a Bedwars lobby and someone mentions your username in chat, BWHelper will automatically fetch and display their Bedwars stats in your chat. This helps you quickly assess your opponents or teammates!
